name: Premium Wireless Headphones
description: Crystal-clear audio with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery, and premium comfort for all-day listening.

description: Advanced health tracking, GPS, AMOLED display, and 7-day battery life in a sleek titanium design.

description: Immersive sound with adaptive ANC, 36-hour total playtime, and IPX5 water resistance for any lifestyle.

name: Mechanical Keyboard TKL
description: Tenkeyless layout with hot-swappable switches, per-key RGB, and aircraft-grade aluminum body.

name: 4K Ultra HD Monitor 27"
description: IPS panel with 144Hz refresh rate, 1ms response time, and factory-calibrated color accuracy for pro creators.

name: Wireless Charging Pad Pro
description: 15W fast wireless charging with multi-device support. Compatible with all Qi-enabled devices including MagSafe.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: 360° immersive sound with 24-hour battery, waterproof IPX7 rating, and built-in speakerphone.

name: USB-C Hub 12-in-1
description: Expand any laptop with 4K HDMI, 100W PD, SD card reader, Gigabit Ethernet, and 4 USB ports.

name: Pro Noise-Cancelling Headset
description: Studio-grade ANC with 40mm drivers, foldable design, and crystal-clear mic for remote work and calls.

name: Power Bank 26800mAh
description: Charge 3 devices simultaneously with 65W USB-C PD output. LED display and ultra-compact aerospace-grade body.

name: Smart Home Security Camera
description: 2K HDR recording, AI motion detection, two-way audio, and 30-day cloud storage for complete home security.

name: Wireless Gaming Mouse
description: 25K DPI optical sensor, 70-hour battery, sub-1ms wireless at 1000Hz polling rate with 6 programmable buttons.

name: Italian Leather Wallet
description: Slim bifold wallet crafted from full-grain Italian leather. RFID blocking with 8 card slots.

name: Polarized Aviator Sunglasses
description: UV400 polarized lenses in lightweight titanium frames. Reduces glare and eye strain all day long.

name: Minimalist Leather Watch
description: Japanese quartz movement with sapphire glass, genuine leather strap, and water-resistant 30m case.

name: Premium Canvas Backpack
description: Waxed canvas with laptop compartment up to 16", YKK zippers, and leather accents. Water-resistant and timeless.

name: Classic Oxford Leather Shoes
description: Goodyear-welted construction with full-grain calfskin upper and cork-cushioned insole for all-day comfort.

name: Cashmere Crew-Neck Sweater
description: 100% grade-A Mongolian cashmere with a relaxed fit. Naturally soft, warm, and exceptionally durable.

name: Slim-Fit Chino Pants
description: Stretch cotton twill in a modern slim fit. Wrinkle-resistant and machine washable for everyday wear.

name: Structured Leather Tote
description: Pebbled leather tote with magnetic closure, interior zip pockets, and detachable shoulder strap.

name: Merino Wool Scarf
description: Extra-fine 18.5-micron Merino wool woven into a generously sized scarf. Ultra-soft and naturally temperature-regulating.

name: Barista Pro Coffee Maker
description: 15-bar pressure espresso machine with built-in burr grinder and milk frother. Café quality at home.

name: Nordic Minimalist Desk Lamp
description: Adjustable LED lamp with 5 color temperatures, wireless charging base, and touch dimmer control.

name: Luxury Merino Throw Blanket
description: Ultra-soft 100% Merino wool throw. Naturally temperature-regulating and hypoallergenic.

name: HEPA Air Purifier H13
description: True HEPA H13 filtration removes 99.97% of airborne particles. Covers 500 sq ft with whisper-quiet operation.

name: Japanese Chef Knife Set
description: High-carbon stainless steel blades with ergonomic pakkawood handles. Razor-sharp and professionally balanced.

name: Smart WiFi Thermostat
description: AI-powered learning thermostat with 7-day scheduling, energy reports, and works with Alexa and Google Home.

name: Linen Duvet Cover King
description: 100% French linen with a natural, lived-in texture. Breathable, durable, and gets softer with every wash.

name: Enameled Cast Iron Dutch Oven
description: 5.5-quart enameled cast iron for perfect braising, soups, and bread baking. Oven-safe to 500°F.

name: Aromatherapy Diffuser Set
description: Ultrasonic diffuser with 10 essential oils, 7 LED colors, timer, and whisper-quiet mist for up to 10 hours.

name: Ceramic Non-Stick Cookware Set
description: 10-piece ceramic-coated set with stay-cool handles. PFOA-free, oven-safe to 450°F, and dishwasher safe.

name: Professional Yoga Mat 6mm
description: Extra-thick non-slip eco-friendly TPE mat with alignment lines and carrying strap included.

name: Insulated Hydro Flask 40oz
description: Triple-wall vacuum insulation keeps drinks cold 24hrs, hot 12hrs. Leak-proof and BPA-free.

name: Adjustable Dumbbell Set 50lb
description: Space-saving 5–50lb adjustable dumbbells with quick-dial weight selection. Replaces 15 sets of weights.

name: Pro Running Shoes Series X
description: Carbon fiber plate with responsive foam midsole. Engineered mesh upper and 4mm heel-to-toe drop for elite performance.

name: Deep Tissue Foam Roller
description: High-density EVA foam with 3-zone grid surface for targeted myofascial release and muscle recovery.

name: Smart Jump Rope Digital
description: Auto-counting digital display with calories, workout time, and Bluetooth app sync. Ball-bearing handles for smooth rotation.

name: Resistance Bands Set 5-Pack
description: 5 resistance levels from 10–50lbs with anti-snap latex, comfort handles, and door anchor. Perfect for any workout.

name: MIPS Cycling Helmet
description: MIPS rotational protection with 18 vents, integrated LED rear light, and adjustable fit system.

name: Trail Hiking Backpack 50L
description: Ultralight 50L pack with frame sheet, hip belt, rain cover, and trekking pole attachment. Fits torso 16–20".

name: Atomic Habits – Special Edition
description: James Clear's #1 bestseller on building good habits. Hardcover special edition with exclusive illustrations.

name: Deep Work by Cal Newport
description: Rules for focused success in a distracted world. Learn to develop a rare and valuable ability to perform cognitively demanding tasks.

name: The Psychology of Money
description: Morgan Housel's timeless lessons on wealth, greed, and happiness. 19 short stories exploring people's complex relationship with money.

name: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
description: Martin Kleppmann's definitive guide to building reliable, scalable, and maintainable systems at scale.

name: The Pragmatic Programmer
description: 20th Anniversary Edition. Your journey to mastery — practical advice for software development excellence.

name: Clean Code by Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship. Learn to write readable, maintainable code that stands the test of time.

name: Zero to One by Peter Thiel
description: Notes on startups, or how to build the future. Peter Thiel's contrarian thinking on innovation and progress.

name: Good to Great by Jim Collins
description: Why some companies make the leap and others don't. A landmark management study of 11 companies that sustained great results.
